title: Figure out situations with girls after Alexandria — fire playlist + stipend
html:
TL;DR

  • Five-line July 2019 todo immediately following the tile for Alexandria farewell prep: make a fire playlist, what to do with the stipend, potentially solidify Alexandria?, why Alexandria.
  • The trailing "why Alexandria" is the meta-question — Yahir is asking himself why he's investing emotional weight here, in writing, the day after the farewell prep — the asking the right question instinct in proto-form.
  • Documents the stipend — Yahir is administering some pool of money in summer 2019 (likely a Boys & Girls Club or program-related disbursement) and treating it as a discretionary resource needing allocation thinking.
  • "Potentially solidify Alexandria?" — relationship-as-deliverable language at age 17, with the question mark — the engineer-mind is already there.
  • Sits one day after the tile note and 51 days before the in flight letter resolves the question with "don't get trapped, advance."

Notes

The note is the decision-frame for Alexandria put on paper. "Potentially solidify Alexandria? / why Alexandria" — Yahir is doing classical pros-and-cons-by-question, listing the action (solidify) next to the audit (why this person specifically). The order matters: he writes potentially solidify first, why second, which means the impulse precedes the rationalization — and he's writing it down to inspect that ordering.

"Make a fire playlist" is the romance-currency teen instinct (a curated music collection as a love object); paired with what to do with the stipend and why Alexandria, the note assembles the three teen vectors — aesthetic curation, money allocation, partner selection — in one breath.

The Sept 10 in-flight letter (2019 09 10 low key writing this to end) is the answer to the "why Alexandria" question: "Remember Alexandria, because she was special, but don't get trapped or glued or even stuck on her, advance." The 51-day arc resolves into pragmatic distance.

Privacy note

No redactions; Alexandria and the stipend are non-identifying.

Connections

  • 2019 07 18 talk about the circle · 2019 07 19 tile for alexandria — same-week sibling notes
  • 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — the resolution
  • alexandria nagy · the emily arc — the structural-precursor relationship arc
  • asking the right question
  • grants pass teen era · boys and girls club
